sources.notes: Same Wishing Cards task as 2174B under the Div.2 contest entry.
Official editorial/commentary describes the value/budget DP and optimized linear-transition form.

annotation.summary: Choose b_i <= a_i and total sum <= k to maximize the sum of prefix maximums.
annotation.constraints: n is large and k is the controlling parameter; the DP state should depend on budget and current maximum value.
annotation.core_idea: Only the first position that can support each value y matters. Raising the current prefix maximum from j to y at that position adds a suffix contribution, so the problem becomes a DP over total card budget and last chosen maximum value.
annotation.complexity: O(n + k^3) direct; O(n + k^2 log k) with Li Chao tree optimization.

solution_variants.name: value-budget-dp
solution_variants.summary: DP on used budget and current maximum card count.

solution_variants.name: li-chao-optimized-dp
solution_variants.summary: Optimize the transition using line maximum queries.

tags.evidence: The accepted approach is a budget/value DP.
The transition adds the suffix contribution created by increasing the prefix maximum.
The optimized solution treats transitions as line maximum queries.
A Li Chao tree is a standard way to implement the optimized transition.
